mnemonics.title: FHS Directory Purposes
mnemonics.content: **B**e **E**xtremely **H**elpful **U**ntil **V**ery **L**ate: **B**in, **E**tc, **H**ome, **U**sr, **V**ar, **L**ib. (Helps remember the core directories and a key purpose: Binaries, Configuration, Home, User programs, Variable data, Libraries.)
